case_title: MARK NORTON VS. WITH FENCING, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (DUE DILIGENCE (FROM DIFFERENCE PROCESSING SERVICE FILED **AFTER** 10/1/14 - PROOF OF SERVICE) (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTON, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT WITH FENCING, INC. TRIAL RESET TO NOV-05-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-26-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WITH FENCING, INC. DBA WITH FENCING INC. SAN FRANCISCO-PENINSULA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,325.00 FILED BY NORTON, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT WITH FENCING, INC. DBA WITH FENCING INC. SAN FRANCISCO-PENINSULA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: ROBERT WITH) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTON, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT WITH FENCING, INC. DBA WITH FENCING INC. SAN FRANCISCO-PENINSULA

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER-UNCLAIMED-UNABLE TO FORWARD/" COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WITH FENCING, INC. DBA WITH FENCING INC. SAN FRANCISCO-PENINSULA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2014 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-09-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "CONTINUED HEARING TO ENABLE DEFENDANTS TO MOVE PLAINTIFF'S FENCE ONTO PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY & PAY PLAINTIFF HIS COSTS", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SCOTT WITH--VICE PRESIDENT COMPANY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTON, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WITH FENCING, INC. DBA WITH FENCING INC. SAN FRANCISCO-PENINSULA $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (REQUEST MADE ON SC-150 FORM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTON, MARK
